ksa_text: Ability to design technical procedures, processes, and system components, integrating technology solutions into cohesive systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-A-003 (Technical Foundations) scores 0.457 composite (signal: moderate). Scope fit for Ontologist: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Edge-case scope, score 0.457 meets threshold. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Technical Foundations KSA TF-A-003 as a discrete competency for Ontologist?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Reviewed against Ontologist market data. Technical content is general platform engineering, not ontology tooling. Score 0.457 with no role-specific keyword match confirms exclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Technical content is general platform engineering, not ontology tooling. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Pass 4 overturn: Technical content is general platform engineering, not ontology tooling.
